text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe is interacting with and setting registry values related to a file named 'winx64_payload.exe' located in a user's Downloads directory. This behavior is highly unusual and suspicious for a legitimate svchost process, suggesting it might be compromised or used by malicious software to track a payload.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "winx64_payload.exe",
    "Downloads directory",
    "reg_set",
    "HKU\\S-1-5-21-...\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT",
    "\\REGISTRY\\A\\{...}\\Root\\InventoryApplicationFile"
  ]
}
